seoTitle: Ivanhoe vs Ivanhoe East — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ivanhoe and Ivanhoe East. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ivanhoe vs Ivanhoe East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ivanhoe and Ivanhoe East.
heading: Ivanhoe vs Ivanhoe East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ivanhoe, Victoria and Ivanhoe East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ivanhoe East has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Ivanhoe (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ivanhoe or Ivanhoe East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ivanhoe has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Ivanhoe East scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ivanhoe scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Ivanhoe East scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ivanhoe or Ivanhoe East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ivanhoe East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
